stemHtml: Are CAT Operators required to provide security training for their flight and/or cabin crew?

options.a: Yes, operators are required to provide this training for their crew members, only for operations with aircraft with more than 19 passenger seats.
options.b: Yes, operator's are required to provide such training for their crew members only for operations from airports that are also used for the military.
options.c: No, security training is NOT required for the operator's crew, only airport personnel require such training.
options.d: Yes, all such operators are required to provide this training for their crew members.
